name: Matthew Lee
details: Hello! I am a 2nd year EECS major from Santa Monica interested in all things software and hardware. Outside of CSM I write coding problems for CALICO and design PCBs for CalSol. I also play guitar and enjoy alternative rock and pop music and collect vinyl's. Feel free to reach out for help!

name: El Liu
details: Hi! I'm a senior studying environmental sciences + data science. I started coding as a junior and haven't looked back since! In my free time, I play Minecraft and Stardew Valley, and I make jewelry. I listen to Twenty One Pilots, Pink Floyd, and Nirvana :) excited to be teaching this semester!

name: Eric Yu
details: Hi everyone! My name is Eric and I am a sophmore studying Data Science. In my free time I enjoy exploring the outdoors by going on hikes, biking, and exploring new places.

name: Toby Leeder
details: Hello! My name is Toby, I am a sophomore studying applied mathematics. I love theater, and I’m on the board of directors for BareStage Productions, a theater company here on campus! I also am in a film production club, and I like playing video games, hiking, reading, and hanging out with friends.

name: Edward Wang
details: Hi, I am Edward, a Freshman from New Jersey/China. I am currently exploring CS + business-adjacent paths. Outside of class, I spend a lot of time running, listening to music, or just walking around campus to clear my mind. I am always open to checking out new spots, but I really like Artichoke. I am excited to meet new people :)

name: Ariel Shen
details: Hi! I'm Ariel, a sophomore from the Bay Area studying Data Science, Econ, and Design. I love  traveling, thrifting, collecting plants, and doomscrolling on Depop. Looking forward to meeting everyone! :3

name: Lyria Zhu
details: Hi there!! I'm a sophomore studying CS & business, currently taking EECS 126 & 127. I love capybaras, flute, and cheese. You can usually find me at a new cafe, out on a hike, or at an SF Symphony concert. At Berkeley, I'm also involved in UCBSO and CSUA. Feel free to reach out about anything!

name: Michael Shen
details: Hi everyone! My name is Michael and I'm a sophomore studying Applied Math and CS (which I only got into recently). I like going to the beach, playing sports, chess, and I really like trying new restaurants (favorites: la burrita, little plearn). Feel free to reach out with any questions or just to chat!

name: Zena Wu
details: Hi! I’m Zena, a second-year from the Bay studying EECS. Outside of school, I enjoy cooking, watching K-dramas, and spending time with friends and family. Looking forward to meeting everyone this semester :)

details: Hi!! My name is Anagha, and I'm a sophomore studying EECS. I'm from the Bay Area, and I love baking, the outdoors, trying new cuisines, matcha, listening to music (sza, tame impala, lorde), and retail therapy. Academically, I'm interested in ML and systems. I'm excited to teach 61C :)

details: I'm a DS major at UC Berkeley who loves CS, startups, and building tech with real world impact. My background includes CS61A, currently CS61B, and teaching CS in high school. Outside class, I love taekwondo, karate, f1, motorsport and Sunday hikes!

name: Ankita Biyani
details: I'm Ankita and I'm an undergrad studying Data Science and Cognitive Science. I love listening to classical, jazz, & pop music and watch movies. I am on the lookout for

Outside of school I love music (R&B and Indie Rock), exploring Berkeley food/cafes, and thrifting! Excited to work with you all!

name: Stephane Finot
details: Hi! I'm Stephane, a second year from the Bay Area studying Applied Math + CS. I like video editing and animation, climbing at Mosaic, and enjoying food with friends. Looking forward to meeting y'all ʕ•ᴥ•ʔ

details: hi i'm angelina, a sophomore studying cogsci and computer science! i like word games, playing badminton, collecting trinkets, and arts & crafts. cs70 was my favorite class i’ve taken so far, so i'm excited to meet you guys : )

name: Eric Lind
details: Hi! I'm Eric, a second-year EECS and MechE student. In my free time I love hiking, reading, doing silly projects, and playing board games (challenge me at Catan if you dare). On campus, I’ve been involved in engineering consulting and the academic intern program. I'm looking forward to an amazing semester!

name: Ryan Wang
details: Hi! I’m a sophomore studying computer science and statistics from the Bay Area. I love trying new food, drinking caffeine, exploring new places, and lately I’ve been getting into combat sports. Excited for this semester!

details: Hi everyone! My name is Prathamesh, and I'm a sophomore majoring in EECS. I'm mostly interested in semiconductors and fabrication. Outside of class, I enjoy playing chess, basketball, and fantasy football. Looking forward to this semester!

details: Hi! I'm a CS major from Singapore. I enjoy reading, writing and watching movies :)

name: Max DeFanti

name: David Hu

name: David Yuan
details: Freshman majoring in EECS – CSM is quite a big step up from teaching 2nd graders Scratch (I love Scratch though!). I also love long hikes, video games (especially rhythm games), stargazing, reading Wikipedia, playing the piano, musical theatre, cats, and making lists of things I love.

name: Thomas Zhao
details: Hello! I’m Thomas, a first-year majoring in EECS from Eastvale, CA. In my free time I enjoy hiking, video games, and noodling on my guitar & saxophone. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or concerns!

name: Marcello Furlan
details: Hi! My name is Marcello and I'm a 2nd year EECS student. I enjoy playing volleyball, pickleball, and Madden. Feel free to reach out about anything. Looking forward to meeting you!

name: Ryan
details:
Hi yall. I'm a sophomore CS student from East SJ, and I'm excited to mentor this semester!! I enjoy reading, biking, gaming, DND (reach out if you want to try), and cooking (don't reach out for this one, this is a solo activity for me >:( )!! At Berkeley, I'm involved with ANova, few recreational clubs, and perhaps a few more in the near future, keep an eye out if you see me.

Also, as of writing this blurb, Tanzie's is hands down the best food at Berkeley (haven't tried the luxury places tho :D)

name: Sami Khayatei Houssaini
details: Hey all! I am Sami, and I am a sophomore studying economics and CS. In my free time, you will most likely find me on the Oakland estuary rowing, hiking, watching soccer, and Formula 1. I took CS61b last fall, and it was one of my favorite courses here at Cal. My favorite data structure is the HashSet, and my favorite algorithm is Kruskal's. I am super excited to be working with you this semester!

name: Matthew
details: Hai there.

name: Swetha Ashok

name: Octavian Yuen
details: Hi! I'm Octavian. I'm currently a second year studying Applied Math and Econ. I love traveling and sports! I'm involved with the Sports Analytics Group as well as work for the Athletics department and softball team on campus. Catch me going on random food side quests on the weekends! I like to eat.

name: Brian Baldetti
details: Hey!!! I'm Brian and am a transfer student in my senor year studying eecs. Besides classes I also work in researching organic semiconductors and am course staff for EE-194 business and finance for engineers. Outside of academic stuff I like to rave and party, run, build various trinkets, and throw events with my club golden records.

name: Sriram Bhimaraju

My favorite coffee on campus is the cafe viennese at Cafe V&A, and my favorite place to eat in Berkeley is Tane!

name: Anoushka Iyer
details: I'm a second year EECS major from the Bay Area. In my free time I enjoy reading, playing basketball, and practicing my (poor) embroidery skills. I'm excited to meet you and looking forward to great sessions together!

name: Gabriel Moreno
details: Hi everyone!  I'm a sophomore EECS major from SoCal.  I have an interest in low-level programming and a soft-spot for DSA.  Super excited to mentor this semester.  Some of my interests include: Pokémon, Sonic the Hedgehog, and Vocaloid.  And now, onwards to a good semester!!

name: Raul Quintero
details: How’s it going my names Raul Quintero, I’m a second year studying Data Science! I love eating chocolate listening to the GOAT Junior H, and hanging out with friends. Gotta say Kansai is my favorite restaurant in Berkeley and it’s where I like to go to slam some sushi with friends!

name: Amber Ramirez
details: Hi! I'm Amber, I'm currently a sophomore studying CS. I am from LA, I love thrifting, scrolling on Tik Tok and playing board games. I also love trying new coffee/matcha shops so if you ever have any recs lmk!

details: Heya, I'm Michael, a freshman Data Science major from Salinas, California. Come talk to me about Bruno Mars, F1, food, standup comedy, card games, or quite literally anything! Excited to be helping out with CS 70 for CSM this semester. 😎

details: Hi, I'm Lucy! I'm a freshman majoring in Data Science and I'm super excited to mentor for C88C this semester! name: Andrew Lau
details: Hi! I'm Andrew and don't be intimidated since I'm just like you trying to survive here at Berkeley. If you want to learn more about my professional experience, feel free to check out my website, but I kinda just enjoy being silly and all so don't expect me to be all professional and super serious!

name: Christine Cho

details: Hello! My name is Kaleb Lee, I'm from Orange County (not Irvine) and I'm into cooking, hiking, and stationary.

name: Araav Nayak
details: Hey all! I'm a freshman studying Data Science, and I took CS 61A in the fall. In my free time, I enjoy strumming the guitar and playing pretty much all sports. Feel free to reach out -- I'm really looking forward to meeting you all!

name: Yechan Park

name: Zayna Lateef
details: Hi! My name is Zayna Lateef. I am a senior studying EECS and am from Orange County. I love EE and a lot of my intersts lies in device physics. I love to be outdoor and my favorite activities are surfing, playing soccer, and laying in the sun. I recently started learning how to do pottery and although I am kinda bad, it is my new favorite activity. I also love listening to music and my favorite artists are Daniel Caesar, Don Toliver, and Barry Can't Swim. My ideal Sunday in Berkeley is a nice stroll down college with a stop at cole coffee and manpuku!
